payload.name: Build Nepal Salary Sheet App
payload.description: Build a complete, production-ready salary sheet web application for a Nepali company complying with Nepal's Income Tax Act 2058, Social Security Act 2075, Labour Act 2074. Tech stack: Frontend React (Vite) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Axios + react-router-dom; Backend Node.js + Express (TypeScript) + Prisma ORM + PostgreSQL; JWT auth (username/password admin); Docker + docker-compose. Single company with multi-tenancy-ready schema (organisation_id hardcoded to 1), soft-delete employees, config table per fiscal year with seed for 2081/82, 20 sample employees, salary heads, fiscal year rates. Implement full backend API, payroll calculation (TDS progressive slabs, SSF contributions, overtime, festival bonus, final settlement), frontend dashboard/pages, seed script, Docker setup, and README.

goal.answer: Deliver a complete, production-ready Nepali salary sheet web application with Docker-based deployment, JWT authentication, Prisma/PostgreSQL backend, React frontend, and correct payroll calculations (TDS, SSF, overtime, festival bonus, final settlement) seeded with 20 employees and FY 2081/82 rates.

payload.plain: Deliver a complete, production-ready Nepali salary sheet web application with Docker-based deployment, JWT authentication, Prisma/PostgreSQL backend, React frontend, and correct payroll calculations (TDS, SSF, overtime, festival bonus, final settlement) seeded with 20 employees and FY 2081/82 rates.

criteria.answer:
Docker Compose (`docker compose up --build`) starts PostgreSQL, backend, and frontend without errors
Prisma migrations apply and `npx prisma db seed` creates admin/admin123 user, Organisation, FY 2081/82 with progressive tax slabs and 10% SSF rates, required SalaryHeads, and 20 realistic Nepali employees with Basic salary structures
Backend API supports JWT login and protected employee/salary-structure CRUD including soft-deactivate with final settlement
Payroll run correctly computes TDS using FY slabs (verified for taxable 400k => 0 and 700k => 20k), employee/employer SSF, overtime, and Dashain festival bonus
E-TDS CSV export and SSF report endpoints return valid downloadable data
Frontend includes working routes/pages: login, dashboard, employees list/detail/add, payroll run/history/detail, reports, settings; uses Axios + JWT and TanStack Query
README documents setup, environment variables, and how to run with Docker

plain: Docker Compose (`docker compose up --build`) starts PostgreSQL, backend, and frontend without errors

Prisma migrations apply and `npx prisma db seed` creates admin/admin123 user, Organisation, FY 2081/82 with progressive tax slabs and 10% SSF rates, required SalaryHeads, and 20 realistic Nepali employees with Basic salary structures
Backend API supports JWT login and protected employee/salary-structure CRUD including soft-deactivate with final settlement
Payroll run correctly computes TDS using FY slabs (verified for taxable 400k => 0 and 700k => 20k), employee/employer SSF, overtime, and Dashain festival bonus
E-TDS CSV export and SSF report endpoints return valid downloadable data
Frontend includes working routes/pages: login, dashboard, employees list/detail/add, payroll run/history/detail, reports, settings; uses Axios + JWT and TanStack Query
README documents setup, environment variables, and how to run with Docker

constraints.answer: Tech stack is fixed: React Vite TypeScript + Tailwind + Axios + react-router-dom; Node Express TypeScript + Prisma + PostgreSQL; JWT username/password auth, No multi-tenancy beyond adding organisation_id defaulting to 1, All employee deletions must be soft deletes; no cascade delete of payroll data, Statutory rates stored in config table per fiscal year, not hard-coded in business logic, Must provide Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, seed script, and README

plain: Tech stack is fixed: React Vite TypeScript + Tailwind + Axios + react-router-dom; Node Express TypeScript + Prisma + PostgreSQL; JWT username/password auth
No multi-tenancy beyond adding organisation_id defaulting to 1
All employee deletions must be soft deletes; no cascade delete of payroll data
Statutory rates stored in config table per fiscal year, not hard-coded in business logic
Must provide Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, seed script, and README

phases.answer: Scaffold & Docker, Database schema & seed, Backend core API, Payroll engine, Payroll & reports API, Frontend, Integration & verification

phaseSnapshots.name: Scaffold & Docker
phaseSnapshots.goal: Create monorepo folder structure, backend and frontend package configs, TypeScript configs, and Docker files so the app can be started with docker-compose

steps.description: Create /backend and /frontend directories with package.json, tsconfig.json, and necessary dev dependencies
Write backend and frontend Dockerfiles and root docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL service
Add root README.md with setup instructions and environment variables

phaseSnapshots.name: Database schema & seed
phaseSnapshots.goal: Define Prisma schema matching the specification, create migration/seed scripts, and populate FY 2081/82 config plus 20 realistic Nepali employees

steps.description: Write prisma/schema.prisma with Organisation, Employee, FiscalYear, SalaryHead, EmployeeSalaryStructure, PayrollPeriod, PayrollTransaction, LeaveRecord, and User models
Write backend/prisma/seed.ts that creates admin user, organisation, salary heads, fiscal year 2081/82 with correct slabs and SSF rates, and 20 employees with basic salary structures

phaseSnapshots.name: Backend core API
phaseSnapshots.goal: Implement authentication middleware, employee CRUD, deactivation with final settlement, and salary structure endpoints

steps.description: Implement auth controller with JWT login and protected-route middleware
Implement employee routes and controller with search, create, update, deactivate, and salary-history endpoints
Implement salary structure routes and controller

phaseSnapshots.name: Payroll engine
phaseSnapshots.goal: Build the payroll calculation service with TDS, SSF, overtime, festival bonus, and final settlement logic

steps.description: Implement TDS calculator with progressive slabs and unit tests for 400k and 700k incomes
Implement SSF calculation splitting employee and employer contributions into sub-heads
Implement overtime and festival bonus helpers
Implement final settlement service with leave encashment and gratuity

phaseSnapshots.name: Payroll & reports API
phaseSnapshots.goal: Expose payroll run, period/payslip endpoints, and generate E-TDS CSV and SSF report

steps.description: Implement payroll run route and controller
Implement period, payslip, ETDS export, and SSF report endpoints

phaseSnapshots.name: Frontend
phaseSnapshots.goal: Build React frontend with login, dashboard, employee pages, payroll pages, reports, and settings

steps.description: Set up Axios instance with JWT header and react-query provider
Implement routing and protected layout
Build login, dashboard, employee list/detail/add, payroll run/history/detail, reports, and settings pages

verification.command: test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx && test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx && test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/Employees.tsx && test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/PayrollRun.tsx && test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx && test -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx

phaseSnapshots.name: Integration & verification
phaseSnapshots.goal: Run containers, seed database, verify API contracts, and ensure frontend builds

steps.description: Build backend and frontend Docker images
Run migrations and seed, then verify a payroll run produces expected TDS amounts

verification.command: docker compose -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/docker-compose.yml run --rm backend npx prisma migrate dev --name init && docker compose -f /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary/docker-compose.yml run --rm backend npx prisma db seed

steps.description: Build frontend for production

assumptions.answer: Project is greenfield; no existing code to reuse or migrate; Fiscal year 2081/82 spans 2024-07-17 to 2025-07-16 for seed dates; tax slabs are 0% first 500k, 10% next 200k, 20% next 300k, 30% next 1M, 36% above; SST is treated as already rebated so net tax uses progressive rates only; SSF employee and employer rates are 10% each of basic salary; sub-head percentages for medical, accident, dependent/pension are configurable in FiscalYear and will be seeded with Nepal SSF standard splits summing to 100% per side; Overtime hourly rate = (Basic + DA) / 240; overtime multiplier = 1.5; daily/weekly limits from FY config; Festival bonus (Dashain) is added for payroll periods overlapping Asoj/Kartik (seeded with a period covering Oct-Nov 2024); Leave encashment daily rate = last basic / 26; gratuity = (last basic / 26) × 15 × completed years; unused annual leave cap defaults to 30 days unless configured later; E-TDS CSV will include standard fields (employee PAN, name, taxable income, tax deducted) because exact IRD format is not specified; Single admin user seeded with username admin and password admin123

payload.summary: Phase 1 complete. Created the monorepo scaffold: backend and frontend package.json/tsconfig files, backend/frontend Dockerfiles with entrypoint and nginx config, root docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL service, and root README.md with setup/env docs. All artifacts verified to exist.

Phase 2 complete. Defined Prisma schema with all required models/enums and RESTRICT delete policies on payroll-critical relations. Created a comprehensive seed script with admin user, organisation, 10 salary heads, FY 2081/82 config, and 20 employees with basic salary structures.

Phase 3 complete. Implemented backend core API: JWT auth controller and protected middleware, employee CRUD with search/pagination and auto Basic structure creation, soft-deactivation with final settlement, salary history, and salary structure CRUD with soft delete. All routes mounted in index.ts and TypeScript compiles cleanly.

Phase 4 complete. Built the payroll engine with TDS progressive-slab calculator (verified for 400k and 700k), SSF contribution splitting into medical/accident/dependent/pension/provident sub-heads, overtime calculation with daily-limit warnings, festival bonus helper for Dashain, and final settlement with leave encashment and gratuity. All engine functions are covered by passing Jest tests (37 tests total) and TypeScript compiles cleanly.

Phase 5 complete. Implemented payroll and reports API: POST /api/payroll/run computes and persists payroll; GET /api/payroll/periods and /periods/:id list and detail periods; GET /api/payroll/payslip/:employeeId/:periodId returns individual payslips; GET /api/payroll/etds-export generates IRD-style TDS CSV; GET /api/payroll/ssf-report generates SSF contribution CSV; PUT /api/payroll/periods/:id/lock locks a period. All endpoints are protected by JWT and TypeScript compiles cleanly.

Phase 6 complete. Built a fully functional React frontend with JWT auth, Axios interceptors, TanStack Query, protected routing, sidebar layout, and all required pages: login, dashboard, employees list/detail/add, payroll run/history/detail, reports, and settings. Added reusable Tailwind components. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

Phase 7 complete. Integration verification was performed within environment constraints: Docker/PostgreSQL were unavailable, so the Docker-based verify commands could not run. Equivalent local verification succeeded: backend and frontend production builds pass, all 37 backend Jest tests pass (including TDS correctness), Prisma schema validates, Prisma client generates, and migration SQL preview confirms correct PostgreSQL DDL with RESTRICT delete constraints. The app is ready to run with Docker on a host that has Docker and Docker Compose installed.

payload.finalSummary: Successfully built the complete Nepal Salary Sheet App across 7 phases. Deliverables include: monorepo scaffold with Docker files and README; Prisma schema with all required models and RESTRICT delete policies; seed script with admin/admin123, Organisation, 10 salary heads, FY 2081/82 with correct tax slabs and SSF rates, and 20 realistic Nepali employees; JWT auth and protected middleware; full employee and salary structure CRUD with soft-delete deactivation and final settlement; payroll engine with TDS (verified 400k=>0, 700k=>20k), SSF contributions, overtime, festival bonus, and final settlement; payroll run and reports API (E-TDS CSV, SSF report, payslip); React frontend with all required pages, JWT/TanStack Query integration, and Tailwind styling. Integration verification was completed within environment constraints: Docker/PostgreSQL were unavailable, so Docker-based runtime verification was replaced with local backend/frontend production builds (both pass), 37 Jest tests (all pass), Prisma schema validation/client generation, and migration SQL preview. The app is deployment-ready and should run with `docker compose up --build` on a Docker-enabled host.

grade.rationale: The payroll engine was rigorously verified with 37 real Jest tests—including the required TDS 400k⇒0 and 700k⇒20k cases—and both backend and frontend production builds passed. However, Docker Compose startup and live database seeding, which are explicit success criteria, were never exercised in the sandbox; integration verification was entirely proxy-based (builds, Prisma schema preview, migration SQL), constituting a material weakness. Gate rationales cite specific test counts and grepped files, but the missing end-to-end container/runtime execution prevents an A.
